message:
fix(autograd): add dtype validation guards to ensure_f32 and ensure_f64

Both methods previously assumed non-matching inputs were F64 or F32
respectively, which could silently misinterpret integer or half-precision
tensors. Now they explicitly check that the input dtype is one of the two
supported floating-point types and return UnsupportedDType error for
anything else, preventing silent data corruption in dtype casting paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
